_comment: Anthropic API list rates per million tokens. Used to compute the API-equivalent cost of subscription usage so the dashboard can show savings. Override per-install with $SUBCTL_PRICING_FILE pointing at a file with the same shape. Update when Anthropic publishes new rates.

subscription_usd_monthly._comment: Default monthly subscription cost per provider. Lets the dashboard compute savings vs paying retail. User can override per account in accounts.conf description if needed.
